name: Ban and unban user in community @ios @medium-risk @2-devices
description:
Verifies that a community admin can ban a user. 
    Banned user cannot send messages anymore.
    Admin then can unban a user and they can send messages again.
descriptionHtml:
Verifies that a community admin can ban a user.
Banned user cannot send messages anymore.
Admin then can unban a user and they can send messages again.
statusMessage:
Error: Modal description is incorrect.
Expected: Are you sure you want to ban Bob from this Community?
Actual: This will ban the selected user from this Community. Are you sure you want to continue?
